outcomes.primary: the complete direct Rust lexer and parser .interp plus every forced-alternative parse tree match the immutable Java 4.13.2 oracles
outcomes.alternate: the pinned antlr-ng TestLookaheadTrees case uses the same grammar, decision, input index, and expected parse trees
outcomes.java_compatibility_verdict: exact Java 4.13.2 recognizer metadata, serialized ATN, and forced-alternative parse-tree equality
